hero.description: Guiding and inspiring learners through online and offline spiritual education. Our expert mentors bring ancient wisdom traditions of Sanathana Dharma to a global community of devoted chanters.

subjects.section_sub: Our eminent and well-trained mentors guide you through these sacred disciplines with depth, devotion and clarity.

vedams.name: Vedams
vedams.desc: The foundational sacred texts of Sanathana Dharma

chandi.name: Chandi Saptashati
chandi.desc: Devi Mahatmyam — glory of the Divine Mother

about.title: About Manthra Prathibhimbam
about.p1: We are delighted to introduce Manthra Prathibhimbam — a globally renowned group dedicated to guiding and inspiring learners through online and offline spiritual education.
about.p2: Our eminent and well-trained mentors possess deep expertise in the sacred scriptures and ancient wisdom traditions of Sanathana Dharma.
about.p3: In addition to online learning, we conduct offline events in various cities and organize sponsored chartered programs. Participants get opportunities to perform and even become lead chanters in these events.
about.tagline: Come, learn, chant, and grow with Manthra Prathibhimbam

lotus.title: The Seven-Petal Lotus
lotus.body: A seven-petal lotus holds profound spiritual significance in Hinduism and Buddhism — representing spiritual awakening, purity, and the journey to enlightenment.

manthra.title: Manthra — The Sacred Utterance
manthra.body: Manthra (मन्त्रम्) is a sacred utterance, a numinous sound — a syllable, word or group of words believed to have religious, magical or spiritual powers.

prathibhimbam.title: Prathibhimbam — The Reflection
prathibhimbam.body: Prathibhimba (प्रतिबिम्ब) means reflection or image. The pratibhimba vāda in Advaita Vedanta says there is only one real witnessing Consciousness, although there are many jīva-s.

maroon.title: Why Manthra in Maroon?
maroon.body: Maroon symbolizes strength, elegance, and sophistication — evoking richness, depth, and passion. Associated with wisdom, calm, and spirituality.

blue.title: Why Prathibhimbam in Blue?
blue.body: Blue is infinity. The sky is blue. The sea is blue. The flame is blue. The earth from above is blue. Blue conveys calmness, trust, wisdom, and boundlessness.

courses.title: Our Courses
courses.sub: Choose how you want to learn — from anywhere in the world online, or join us in person at events across cities.

online.title: Online Courses
online.tagline: Learn from anywhere in the world
online.body: Join our vibrant online learning community and receive guidance from expert mentors across all major spiritual texts, manthra chanting and Sanskrit pronunciation.
online.note: Course details available inside the group under respective sub-groups.

offline.title: Offline Events
offline.body: We conduct offline events in various cities and organize sponsored chartered programs. Participants get opportunities to perform and even become lead chanters.
offline.note: Watch this space for upcoming events near you.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.sub: Glimpses from our events, programs and learning sessions.
gallery.note: Gallery photos will be added soon. Check back for moments from our events & programs.

news.title: News & Announcements
news.sub: Stay updated with our latest programs, events and future plans.

current.title: Online Batch — Currently Running
current.body: Our online spiritual education sessions are currently running. Join the group to access all course details in respective sub-groups.

upcoming.title: Offline Events Across Cities
upcoming.body: We are planning offline events and sponsored chartered programs across multiple cities. Participants may perform as lead chanters.

future.title: Expanding Curriculum & Languages
future.body: We aim to expand to include more foreign languages alongside Samskritham and deepen our Sree Vidya practices.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.sub: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out via WhatsApp, email or visit us.
